pr.title: RHOAIENG-60406: [RHOAIENG] CVE-2026-32274 Black: Arbitrary file writes from unsanitized user input in cache file name [rhoai-3.3]
pr.body:
Add black>=26.3.1 override-dependency to all 7 affected jupyter image
pyproject.toml files on the rhoai-3.3 branch to address CVE-2026-32274,
an arbitrary file write vulnerability via unsanitized cache file names
in the Black code formatter. Regenerated pylock.toml lock files to pick
up the patched version.

Closes [RHOAIENG-60406](https://redhat.atlassian.net/browse/RHOAIENG-60406)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
Signed-off-by: Jiri Danek <jdanek@redhat.com>
pr.author: jira-autofix[bot]
